name: agent-ready
description: Spec complete — agent may pick this up

name: agent-in-progress
description: An agent run currently owns this issue

name: agent-blocked
description: Agent hit a question only a human can answer

name: needs-human
description: Too ambiguous or risky for an agent — human review first

name: triage
description: Filed by feedback-triage — awaiting human promotion

name: agent-pr
description: PR opened by issue-worker — counts toward WIP limit
